source_jobs.description:
<h2 class="row-heading">Don’t See an Open Position?</h2>
<p>We’re always on the lookout for talented professionals to join our team. If you don’t find any openings that interest you at the moment, you are welcome to send us your portfolio / resumé for future consideration.</p>

notes: Kettle is a creative agency with a focus on digital experiences. No tech roles were found in the job postings.
